untranslatable_reason: Broadening Tops pattern requires multi-bar swing detection (progressively higher highs AND lower lows over N bars) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. Pattern detection logic needs historical swing point analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a chart pattern (Broadening Tops) that requires identifying swing extremes over multiple bars. The entry conditions reference pattern formation which is fundamentally a multi-bar sequence recognition task. Provided a simplified approximation using successive bar comparison (higher high + lower low) as a breakout proxy, but this does not capture the true broadening pattern geometry. Exit conditions were AUTHOR_SILENT so applied mean-reversion logic (crossing SMA_20) as a reasonable reversal indicator for both long and short positions.
